brief_justification: Chose (B) instead of correct (D), missing that the internal DNS server also applies source IP ACLs for split-horizon logic; goes beyond surface by explaining split-horizon routing mechanism but stops one level short of the internal server's own view-selection logic; addresses option (D) explicitly but doesn't question the core assumption that reaching the internal server is sufficient; mentions (D) as a condition but never tests whether the internal server could still enforce split-horizon by source IP; presents conclusion as certain ('The answer is (B)') without acknowledging ambiguity about how the internal server's ACLs are configured; explicitly engages with (D) and provides a rejection reason, though the reason is incorrect; shows the query path clearly (VPN → internal server → internal view) but skips the intermediate step of how the server selects which view to return
